Frequently Asked Questions
1. RPSC Junior Legal Officer JLO Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 19 August 2025.
2. RPSC Junior Legal Officer JLO Recruitment Exam Date 2026?
The Examination will be conducted in 26-27 July 2026
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the RPSC Junior Legal Officer JLO Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the RPSC Junior Legal Officer JLO Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. RPSC Junior Legal Officer JLO Recruitment Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. RPSC Junior Legal Officer JLO Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 25 September 2025.
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 25 September 2025 .
7. How can I apply for RPSC Junior Legal Officer JLO Exam?
Rajasthan RPSC JLO 2025 Admit Card 2026 .
tables: Rajasthan RPSC Junior Legal Officer JLO Recruitment 2025 Exam Date / Admit Card

Rajasthan Public Service Commission has released the advertisement of Junior Legal Officer JLO Post 2025. Can Apply Online from 20/08/2025 to 25/09/2025. Those candidates who are interested in this JLO Advt. No. 08/ EXAM/J.L.O.-JDA /EP-1/2025-26 fulfill the eligibility can Download the Result. For other information related to recruitment like syllabus, age limit, qualification, pay scale and all other information read the advertisement and then apply.
